name: caliper-test
description: Gridfinity 2x1 12u bin with L-shaped contoured pocket for HARTE 6-inch digital caliper, upright storage. v2: tighter 1mm clearance, no finger relief.

testPrintCandidates.reason: L-shaped pocket with 1mm clearance per side is tight. The caliper cross-section must match the pocket contour. Test with a short section including the display cavity to beam slot transition.
Beam slot is 18x7mm with 1mm clearance per side on a 16x5mm nominal beam. Tighter than v1. Verify the beam slides freely.
Display body pocket is 64mm deep (63mm body + 1mm clearance). If actual display body length exceeds 63mm, it may not seat below the ledge correctly.
